# ponyc GitHub Actions workflows

## Known Couplings

Workflow couplings — non-obvious dependencies between workflows and the scripts and Make targets they drive — are recorded one-per-file in the top-level `.known-couplings/` directory, alongside the rest of the repository's couplings. Read the relevant ones before changing a workflow or its scripts; to record a new one, follow the instructions in the top-level `AGENTS.md`.
